# trofimov.ca for LLMs

This site exposes a public machine-readable profile API for Slava Trofimov.

Start here:
- /SKILL.md

Then use:
- /api/context
- /api/profile
- /api/skills
- /api/experience
- /api/projects
- /api/summary?audience=agent
- /api/search?q=...
- /api/contact-info

Schema:
- /openapi.json
